description: Canonical GitHub identity for Z-Sanctuary ecosystem tooling, Cursor, and Folder Manager alignment. If this repository is ever public, treat primary_email as sensitive—prefer a private mirror or strip email and keep it only in local git config.

github.operator_notes: GitHub Settings → Emails: keep this address verified and (if desired) primary for commit attribution and notifications.

ecosystem_repos.notes: Side ecosystem; link clones under pc_root or sibling folders per Z-EAII layout.
Aligns with roulette / Replit analyzer tracks; register in z_pc_root_projects when a local path exists.

integrations.cursor: Clone/push using the same GitHub account; SSH URL or HTTPS + credential manager. PATs never committed—use OS secret store.
integrations.github_copilot_and_spark: Use GitHub signed-in session (Edge) for Copilot / Spark features; same login as ManojK626 keeps context consistent with local remotes.
integrations.ci_actions: Repository secrets (PAT, deploy keys) live only in GitHub repo Settings → Secrets, not in ZSanctuary_Universe files.
